name: io.github.imprezahost/impreza-mcp
title: Impreza Host
description: Deploy apps and manage servers, domains/DNS, VPS lifecycle and crypto balance on Impreza Host — privacy-first, no-KYC, offshore/DMCA-resistant hosting paid in Bitcoin/Monero — from your AI. (Impreza Host the hosting provider — not the Impreza WordPress theme.)

environmentVariables.name: IMPREZA_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Impreza API key (imp_…), from the clientarea → Impreza API.

environmentVariables.name: IMPREZA_API_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: Impreza API secret (shown once when the key is created).

environmentVariables.name: IMPREZA_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: API base URL. Defaults to https://api.imprezahost.com.
